name: Mega Menu Link
description: Curated submenu link with optional description, icon and badge. It can target a URL, category, product or B2C Content Asset.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Mega Menu Link
attribute_definition_groups.description: Curated submenu link with optional description, icon and badge. It can target a URL, category, product or B2C Content Asset.

attribute_definitions.name: Description
attribute_definitions.description: Optional supporting text displayed beneath the label.

attribute_definitions.name: Badge
attribute_definitions.description: Optional short badge such as New, Sale or Guide.

attribute_definitions.name: Destination type
attribute_definitions.description: Select which destination field drives the link.

attribute_definitions.name: URL
attribute_definitions.description: Safe relative or HTTP(S) URL used when Destination type is URL.

attribute_definitions.name: Category
attribute_definitions.description: Catalog category used when Destination type is Category.

attribute_definitions.name: Product
attribute_definitions.description: Catalog product used when Destination type is Product.

attribute_definitions.name: B2C Content Asset ID
attribute_definitions.description: Exact online Content Asset ID used when Destination type is Content.

attribute_definitions.name: Content path template
attribute_definitions.description: Relative route containing {id}. The default matches the toolkit blog route.

attribute_definitions.name: Icon
attribute_definitions.description: Optional predefined icon; no arbitrary SVG or script is accepted.

attribute_definitions.name: Visual style
attribute_definitions.description: Plain link, highlighted card or compact chip.

attribute_definitions.name: Accessible label override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional screen-reader label when the visible label needs extra context.
